concept_decisions.rationale: Conflicts span several distinct causal methods.
The concept remains distinct; the conflict paper is only a feasibility boundary case.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: synthetic control arms vs synthetic control material
concept_decisions.rationale: Two different meanings of synthetic control are present.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: general vs hidden-population vs MSE vs multistate vs publication-bias CRC
concept_decisions.rationale: Conflict records span several distinct CRC subtypes.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: calibration vs synthesis vs validation vs passive signal detection
concept_decisions.rationale: Conflict records mix synthesis, validation, passive-signal work, and one calibration paper.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: diagnostic vs preference vs trajectory vs etiology vs generic latent class uses
concept_decisions.rationale: Conflict records cover several distinct latent-class use cases.
